scripts.build: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run copy:core && pnpm run build:renderer && pnpm run sync:cli
scripts.sync:cli: mkdir -p ../cli/dist/electron/core && mkdir -p ../cli/dist/electron/renderer && cp dist/main.js ../cli/dist/electron/ && cp dist/preload.js ../cli/dist/electron/ && cp -r dist/core/* ../cli/dist/electron/core/ && cp -r dist/renderer/* ../cli/dist/electron/renderer/ && echo 'Synced desktop files to CLI bundle'
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:main && concurrently "pnpm run dev:main" "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on dist/main.js http://localhost:7898 && NODE_ENV=development electron dist/main.js
